Description.DefaultValue:
Attack: single target, 1 hit

Places on most injured ally Continuous heal 15% for 2 turns. 

Attacking an enemy under Fear debuff, places on most injured ally 2 Continuous heal 15% for 2 turns instead.

Attack: single target, 1 hit

Heals self and most injured ally for 10,000 HP.
Places on all enemies Heal Reduction 100% for 2 turns with 75% chance.

Attack: - 

Heals all allies for 40% of their HP.

If target was healed to MAX_HP, places on them Shield for 2 turns equal to 25% of their MAX HP.

Attack: - 

When dies, fills all allies Turn Meter by 20%. 
If 4770 is in your team, revives with 75% HP.
